# rudderstack_destination_http (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Destination specific configuration. Check the nested block documentation for more information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config))
- `name` (String) Human readable name of the destination. The value has to be unique across all the destinations.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) An enabled destination allows data to be sent to it.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Time when the resource was created, in ISO 8601 format.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String) Time when the resource was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

<a id="nestedblock--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Required:

- `api_url` (String) Enter the base URL for your HTTP endpoint.

Optional:

- `api_key_name` (String) Enter the header name for API key authentication. Required when `auth` is set to `apiKeyAuth`.
- `api_key_value` (String, Sensitive) Enter the value for API key authentication. Required when `auth` is set to `apiKeyAuth`.
- `auth` (String) Select the authentication method used for the HTTP request.
- `bearer_token` (String, Sensitive) Enter the bearer token used for authorization. Required when `auth` is set to `bearerTokenAuth`.
- `connection_mode` (Block List, Max: 1) Configure the connection mode for each supported source type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--connection_mode))
- `consent_management` (Block List, Max: 1) Allows you to specify consent configuration data for multiple providers for each source type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--consent_management))
- `event_filtering` (Block List, Max: 1) Choose whether to allowlist or denylist client-side events. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--event_filtering))
- `format` (String) Select the body format for the outgoing request.
- `headers` (List of Object) Build custom request headers using constants or values from the RudderStack payload. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--headers))
- `is_batching_enabled` (Boolean) Enable batching for JSON payloads.
- `is_default_mapping` (Boolean) Send the event payload as-is when enabled.
- `max_batch_size` (String) Specify the maximum number of events to include in a batch, up to 100.
- `method` (String) Select the HTTP method to use when sending requests.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Enter the password for basic authentication. Required when `auth` is set to `basicAuth`.
- `path_params` (List of Object) Enter path parameters in sequence using JSON path values or constants. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--path_params))
- `properties_mapping` (List of Object) Map the outgoing request payload using JSON path keys and values from the RudderStack payload or constants. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--properties_mapping))
- `query_params` (List of Object) Map query parameter keys to values from the RudderStack payload or constants. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--query_params))
- `username` (String) Enter the username for basic authentication. Required when `auth` is set to `basicAuth`.
- `xml_root_key` (String) Enter the XML root key used as a common prefix for mapped fields.
